entry.title: New: BILL049(24) (Honolulu) — Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.
entry.content:
RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXATION.

Establishes a real property tax exemption for real property whose assessed valuations exceed an unspecified percentage of the previous tax year’s assessed value and for which a homeowner’s exemption has been claimed for an unspecified number of years. Allows the real property tax exemption to continue to apply if the real property is inherited in sole ownership by a single family member who is eligible for the home exemption with respect to that real property, and the real property continues to be held in sole ownership. Effective upon the enactment of certain State legislation.

Latest action: Councilmember Nishimoto took office on January 2, 2025.

View on the council site
